svg.title: FDAI agent-driven runtime
svg.desc: External signals enter the shared typed event bus and reach Huginn. Huginn publishes normalized events that fan out to Heimdall and Forseti. Heimdall, Njord, Freyr, Loki, Mimir, and Muninn contribute findings, domain evidence, rules, and context without calling one another directly. Forseti owns decisions and asks Odin to arbitrate cross-domain conflicts. Eligible decisions reach Thor, while Var owns human approval and Vidar owns rollback. Forseti, Thor, Var, and Vidar publish audit evidence to Saga. Saga outcomes reach Norns, which proposes inert rule candidates to Mimir. Bragi reads context from Muninn and returns typed action proposals to Huginn so conversations use the same governed path.
svg.text: Independently runnable agents coordinate through typed events while authority stays with one writer for each object type.

g.aria-label: Signals and operator requests. Signals and operator requests
Shared typed event bus. Schema validation, subscriber isolation, retry, dead-letter, and replay
Huginn - event owner. Normalizes and publishes object.event
Heimdall - observer. Anomaly, drift, and forecast findings
Njord - cost evidence. Njord - cost evidence
Freyr - capacity evidence. Freyr - capacity evidence
Loki - chaos evidence. Loki - chaos evidence
Mimir - rules and policy. Mimir - rules and policy
Muninn - state and context. Muninn - state and context
Forseti - decision owner. Sole writer of object.verdict
Odin - arbitration owner. Resolves cross-domain conflicts
Thor - action owner. Sole privileged executor
Var - approval owner. Var - approval owner
Vidar - rollback owner. Vidar - rollback owner
Saga - audit owner. Append-only terminal evidence
Norns - learning candidate owner. Norns - learning candidate owner
Bragi - conversation translator. Bragi - conversation translator
